message: Remove card margin; rely on view padding

files.patch:

 		cols = 2
 	}
 	baseStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().

 		Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).
 		BorderForeground(lipgloss.Color(borderColorBase)).
 		Padding(0, cardPadding)
